title: S.O.S. Tidal Wave
writer: Gordon Kahn, Stanley Rauh, Maxwell Shane
actors: Ralph Byrd, George Barbier, Kay Sutton
plot: In a city election, one of the candidates, Clifford Farrow, has a criminal background and is backed by crime boss Melvin Sutter. Sutter doesn't hesitate to escalate the violence in the face of any resistance.
